title: cnicus horridus
intro: Cnicus horridus, also known as St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cnicus horridus include relief from anxiety and depression, improved sleep quality, and reduced inflammation. Cnicus horridus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies for its therapeutic effects.
